mapper.insert: insert into basic_info (user_id, sex, phone, birth_date, culture, is_single_parent, is_abandon, residential, marital, trauma, trauma_time, relative_suicide,mental_illness, family_mental_history, close_rel, resident, neighbor_rel, colleague_rel, favour, comfort, share, seek_help, group_activity, dating_engaged, dating_lose, parents_conflict, family_finance_dif, debt, family_ser_inj, family_die, ser_inj, unemployed, work_pressure, poor_mark, roommates_dis, life_law_change, friend_ser_inj, friend_die, misunderstood, stolen, accidental_shock,log_date) values (#{userId},#{sex},#{phone},#{birthDate},#{culture},#{isSingleParent},#{isAbandon},#{residential},#{marital},#{trauma},#{traumaTime},#{relativeSuicide},#{mentalIllness}, #{familyMentalHistory},#{closeRel},#{resident},#{neighborRel},#{colleagueRel},#{favour},#{comfort},#{share},#{seekHelp},#{groupActivity},#{datingEngaged}, #{datingLose},#{parentsConflict},#{familyFinanceDif},#{debt},#{familySerInj},#{familyDie},#{serInj},#{unemployed},#{workPressure},#{poorMark}, #{roommatesDis},#{lifeLawChange},#{friendSerInj},#{friendDie},#{misunderstood},#{stolen},#{accidentalShock},#{logDate})
mapper.update: update basic_info set sex=#{sex},phone=#{phone},birth_date=#{birthDate},culture=#{culture},is_single_parent=#{isSingleParent},is_abandon=#{isAbandon},residential=#{residential}, marital=#{marital},trauma=#{trauma},trauma_time=#{traumaTime},relative_suicide=#{relativeSuicide},mental_illness=#{mentalIllness},family_mental_history=#{familyMentalHistory}, close_rel=#{closeRel},resident=#{resident},neighbor_rel=#{neighborRel},colleague_rel=#{colleagueRel},favour=#{favour},comfort=#{comfort},share=#{share}, seek_help=#{seekHelp},group_activity=#{groupActivity},dating_engaged=#{datingEngaged},dating_lose=#{datingLose},parents_conflict=#{parentsConflict}, debt=#{debt},family_ser_inj=#{familySerInj},family_die=#{familyDie},ser_inj=#{serInj},unemployed=#{unemployed}, work_pressure=#{workPressure},poor_mark=#{poorMark},roommates_dis=#{roommatesDis},life_law_change=#{lifeLawChange},friend_ser_inj=#{friendSerInj}, friend_die=#{friendDie}, misunderstood=#{misunderstood}, stolen=#{stolen}, accidental_shock=#{accidentalShock},log_date=#{logDate},family_finance_dif=#{familyFinanceDif} where user_id = #{userId}
